name: Cozy 16-bit Fantasy

base.subject: a small friendly wizard with a pointed hat, full body, idle pose
base._note: Used only if no base.png is present — generated first, then derived from.

style.render_style: 16-bit pixel art, retro SNES-era game sprite
style.palette: warm earthy tones, limited ~16 color palette
style.outline: clean 1px dark outline around every shape
style.shading: limited flat shading with light dithering
style.composition: one centered isolated asset, plain transparent background

negative: no smooth gradients or soft 3D shading
